articles.title: ‘Toucher and Hardy’ and 98.5 The Sports Hub clean up in spring Nielsen ratings
articles.description:
Overall, the Sports Hub earned a 12.4 overall share among men 25-54 in the period from April 2-June 24. Fellow sports station WEEI was seventh with a 4.2.
